release_notes: OLED 2.42 beta build 44. Cleans up the web UI layout by consolidating duplicate setup cards and restructuring the page order into Current status, Page view, Patient & display, Glucose alert limits, Insulin / bolus, WhatsApp notifications, and Firmware and support actions. Moves Save settings into Current status. Moves display/night dimming, sensor data, and Wi-Fi networks under Patient & display. Moves Cloud WhatsApp, caregiver alarms, repeat rules, and care reminders under WhatsApp notifications.
